description: I found their service on the internet and I especially like the price, which suits me because of the start-up company we are currently working on.
author: Tomáš B.
pros: user-friendly interface, affordability, all-in-one capabilities
cons: If Seobase's reporting lacks depth or customization, it can make it difficult to extract truly actionable insights.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I'm so happy and satisfied 😊! Thanks to Seobase, I was able to identify duplicate properties pointing to my website in my Google Search Console account. This is a crucial first step in improving my website's performance and visibility on the internet. I'm now considering creating the backlinks suggested by Seobase to further enhance my web presence.
author: Mohammad A.
pros: It is straight right to the point. For the first time since the creation of my website three years ago I got clear insights about my website visibility index, which was remarkably as low as 3, to discover later on after a thorough inspection of my site audits that I have two domains in the Google Search Console pointing to the same site that not only causing duplications but also affecting my site's SEO so badly. I highly recommend Seobase for developers and even average people. It serves as a simple and trustworthy tool that provides an overall idea about the true state of their site, allowing users to dig deeper if they wish.
cons: If anything, the limited number of projects can be created in the free version.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: I Think They Went Out of Business
description: I actually think they may have gone out of business. When the rank tracker broke in Jan 2025 after Google implemented anti-scraping measures, I tried reaching out to their support 4 different times over the course of a couple of weeks. Tried their chatbot and I tried some email addresses I found online. No response. I finally just canceled my account.
author: Trever C.
pros: It's very cheap compared to competitors.
cons: Customer service is nonexistent. They never respond. Backlink tracker doesn't pick up backlinks that other trackers do. Rank tracker completely broke as of Jan 2025 when Google implemented anti-scraping measures.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

author: Diogo D.
pros: What I liked most about this tool was its ease of use. I've used other apps for SEO and, without a doubt, SEOBASE is one of the simplest I've ever used. Furthermore, there are a large number of tools that enhance the results possible with SEO strategies. Great!
cons: I didn't like that it took me so long to find this tool! If I had found her sooner, I would have solved some problems!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I found SEOBase while looking for a web-based rank tracker. It not only has that feature but many others.
author: Ana N.
pros: Rank Tracker feature was my favorite. You can order the list by Rank (latest position), Change (great for finding worrying drops), Avg. (average within the chosen date range), or Best (also within that date range)
cons: The Site Profiler suggestions seemed a bit incomplete in my current plan. Not sure if this will improve with an upgrade.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It was fine when it was working. A few months ago it simply stopped working, sent a ticket to support, no answer to this day. Tried reaching out via email - radio silence. Choose any other tool or be prepared to be disappointed.
author: Vytautas V.
pros: I liked when it was working, but that was long ago.
cons: I opened a ticket approx. 3 months ago, still received no answer, the platform is not working, most of the functions show an error or do not work at all, the support is nonexistent.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Simply the Easiest Yet Powerful SEO Tool to Use Without Breaking the Bank.
description: Since I am barely launching my business I haven't been able to purchase it yet, however I love the pricing and in my most honest opinion. For starters, if your website doesn't have hundreds of thousands of visitors a month. This tools is just perfect.
author: Edgar M.
pros: SEO Base does most of the heavylifting and analysis on the backend, thats how you can be presented with such a simple vew for the data you're looking for. I have used plenty of SEO tools and although it is not perfect, it certainly excels in a couple KEY perspectives, which for people like me, are a gamechanger. My main concern with other tools is the sheer amount of data and concepts that are being blasted at your face. When using SEOBase you can tell there is a definitive incline for simplicity all across the board. From the design and imput required, the data provided by your querys and up to the overall tool's workflow. This tool offers everything you need from the biggest SEO Softwares without the expensive pricing, stiff learning curve and overcrowding information. If you're like me that prefers a simple perspective to desicionmaking, then this is the tool for you.
cons: Their free plan feels more like a quick 10 minute demo than an actual free tier, however it gives a glance to the quality of the tool, which is great. Also. If you're comming from one of the big SEO tools, then you might find SEO Base lacks certain functionalities or capabilities. However, the tools that it has, actually works great.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Cheap and useful SEO tools I've ever seen
description: With less cost, we get the functions we need for our website SEO and save time for the easy-use interface.
author: chenyou Z.
pros: The interface is very intuitive, and the functions are very easy to get started, saves us a lot of time to learn how it works, and it helps us start immediately our SEO strategy and modification regarding the data analysis from Seobase.
cons: For the backlink part, we hope there are some backlink creation suggestions or backlink construction platforms suggestions.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: An SEO solution for entrepreneurs and innovators
description: We were looking for a solution to start monitoring the keyword positioning of websites that we are promoting with new SEO techniques, we contacted the SEOBase team, we followed their steps on linkedin and we were convinced by their quick response. Now together we launch ourselves into the 2022 SEO monitoring metrics
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: it is a very easy to use solution that quickly adapts to our daily work processes
cons: There are some integrations that we want to check in the next month, in the free versión we don't have those options
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Seobase has been crucial for us in defining and tracking keywords for our clients over the last six months.
author: Thomas S.
pros: The clean interface presents information in a clear and easily navigable fashion. The price is competitive and the tools are on lar with the major players.
cons: The software is being updated continually and as if yet I haven't discovered anything I outright dislike.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Seobase: Empowering SEO Success with Comprehensive Insights
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I liked how Seobase seamlessly integrated a wide array of essential SEO tools into one platform, providing comprehensive insights into website performance, keyword research, competitive analysis, and more. The user-friendly interface and actionable data made optimizing websites for better search engine visibility straightforward and effective.
cons: While Seobase offers an impressive range of features, I found that the pricing could be a bit steep for smaller businesses or individuals on a tight budget. Additionally, there were occasional lags in data updates, which could affect real-time decision-making for some users.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Anrijs F.
pros: Great site design and structure, you understand where to look what you want.
cons: In Free plan there are only 5 pages crawled per audit.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I created my first website and using Seobase I was able to identify and correct a lot of problems like: - adding meta description - add appropriate meta keyowrds - use H1 tag - images and title optimization More than that I try to use the data available from Seobase to improve my content and gain more viewers.
author: Ionut M.
pros: I am glad that I found a platform that offer more information for a website and it is really easy to use, due to its intuitive interface and also have details under each tab that you click on. I am new in this topic and I try to rank my new website; after several try on few other platform I finally found one that offer a full set of information so if you just want to create a personal website and you want to keep it ranked, Seobase gives you this solution at no cost which is awsome, of course frequency of use for the ranking status will be low. Due to the facte there are a lot of explanations and hints you can easily integrate them into your website. I think also for bussineses this is a great aded value.
cons: I think that there can be a limitation for a full website report, but only 5 keyword searches in 24 hours I think is to much to wait for.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Very good, It is helping me get higher up Google rankings
author: Colin O.
pros: It gives you a very good into your web page and what is required to make it better
cons: I do not fully understand some of the technical wording
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Helped me a lot in the process of implementing SEO strategy for business. I used to often use Ahrefs but by chance someone introduced me to SEOBASE and I was trying it out and the results were amazing, I feel this is a very easy to use application, and I have it all all that ahrefs has....
author: Thai L.
pros: 1. Perform Backlink Audit 2. Find potential links 3. Keyword Research 4. Keyword and competitor analysis 5. Track competitor keywords 6. Track Total Organic Visibility
cons: I'm learning how to use it, so I haven't felt all the features of SEOBASE yet
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Best Tool for Freelancer and small businesses
author: An L.
pros: As a Freelancer with a small company and moreover a small budget I was looking for an affordable SEO Tool to monitor different keywords and my success on Search Engines and also to get ideas what I can do better to get higher in the rankings. Most of the Tools on the market are too expensive for Single Users and small companies and are made for bigger budgets. Therefore I was happy to find SEOBASE, which has the best price on the market so far. Its easy to understand and easy to set up the first Project. On the Dashboard you get a quick overview of your Results. Within the project you get detailed information about your project and keywords and the results in ranking.Its worth to try SEOBASE. The price is not beatable so far for smaller Companies and Freelancer.
cons: At the moment I don’t see any cons as I am using a SEO Tool for the first time. Maybe there are some features missing but I am sure that they will invent the product in the future with more features ahead.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Quelson L.
pros: As a small business owner, I've always found SEO a bit daunting. However, SEOBase changed that for me. The interface is incredibly user-friendly, making it easy for someone like me to understand and implement SEO strategies effectively. The comprehensive tools, especially the Keyword Explorer, have been crucial in improving my website's visibility. Moreover, the affordability of SEOBase allows me to optimize my online presence without stretching my budget. I'm genuinely impressed with the results and highly recommend SEOBase to other small business owners looking to boost their SEO.
cons: One downside of SEOBase is the limited depth in some of its features, which might not meet the needs of very advanced users or larger enterprises requiring more sophisticated analytical capabilities.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Aleksandr L.
pros: Very flexible tool to identify all problems you could have
cons: I haven't found any cons yet. It's perfect for all my needs
